text.title: Link Building Phase Checklist
text.summary: Phase-by-phase checklist from preparation through ongoing maintenance.

list.item: Audit existing content for link-worthiness
Identify 3-5 potential link magnet assets
Document current backlinks (Ahrefs or Moz baseline)
Analyze competitor backlink profiles
Set up tracking: Ahrefs/Moz account, Hunter.io, link tracking spreadsheet
Set link acquisition target (number of links per month)
Create or update link magnet asset (research, tool, guide, data)
Ensure comprehensive unique value — not a rewrite of existing content
Add visuals: charts, infographics, embeddable data
Write 1-2 paragraph asset description for outreach use
Create key statistics / findings summary
Prepare social media graphics for promotion
Export competitor backlinks from Ahrefs, filter by DR 40+
Search "[topic] + resources" and "[topic] + useful links" for resource pages
Use Ahrefs broken link tool on high-DA niche pages
Sign up for HARO / Qwoted and monitor daily queries
Build master prospect list of 100+ sites
Segment by opportunity type and domain authority
Find contact information for each prospect (Hunter.io, LinkedIn)
Read 2-3 recent articles per prospect for personalization material
Write 2-3 outreach template variants (resource page, broken link, guest post)
Personalize first line for each email
Send in batches of 50/day maximum
Log all sends in tracking spreadsheet
Respond to all replies within 24 hours
Send one follow-up after 7 days of no response
Monitor new backlinks daily (first week of campaign)
Record: domain, DR, dofollow/nofollow, anchor text
Calculate response rate and link acquisition rate
Identify which templates and prospect types had highest conversion
Double down on best-performing tactics
Create SOP for future campaigns from learnings
Maintain 20-50 outreach emails per month minimum
Create linkable assets quarterly
Audit internal links: new to old, old to new, orphan pages
Monitor competitor link activity
Report: new referring domains, DR distribution, ranking changes
